top_signals.title: Italy settles on Airbus tanker purchase in swing toward European equipment
top_signals.summary: The deal marks a shift from Boeing to Airbus for the Italian Air Force, which flies four Boeing 767-based tanker aircraft which entered service from 2011.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: War in pieces: Air Force wants special ops plane that can be built on the fly
top_signals.summary: The Skyraider II, a militarized version of the AT-802 crop duster, is built to give isolated special ops teams eyes overhead and firepower on call.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s Xi and Russia’s Putin praise ties at Beijing talks
top_signals.summary: Coming on the heels of Trump's visit to ‌Beijing, the optics and outcomes of the summit between the Chinese and Russian leaders will be closely watched.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank Indonesia Surprises With Jumbo Rate Hike to Defend Rupiah
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s central bank delivered a larger-than-expected interest-rate increase to intensify its defense of the rupiah after the currency tumbled to successive record lows this month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: NATO Not Drawing Up Plans for Hormuz Mission
top_signals.summary: NATO is not drawing up any plans for a potential mission in the Strait of Hormuz and would need a political decision to do so, its top commander said on Tuesday, amid suggestions by some members that the alliance could play a role there.Any…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
